name: ticket-workflows
description: Structured ticket workflow with progressive context, beads integration, quality gates, and per-stage agents (dev, review, QA, coverage)

hooks.command: echo 'New branch detected. Run /ticket-workflows:begin to initialize workflow context.'
sh -c 'if ! ls changes/*.* 2>/dev/null | head -1 > /dev/null; then echo "[ticket-workflows] no changelog fragment found in changes/"; fi'

sh -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ]; then TYPE=${BRANCH%%/*}; REST=${BRANCH#*/}; TICKET=${REST%%/*}; DESC=${REST#*/}; DIR=".scratch/ticket-workflows/$TYPE/$TICKET-$DESC"; if [ -d "$DIR" ]; then echo "[ticket-workflows] workflow context exists at $DIR - consider updating before ending session."; fi; fi'
